name: kagome_tee_2x2

method.ground_state: Lanczos refined seeded by p6m (Γ, B_1) projection of random complex RBM (in-loop sector projection — see commit aaa1518)

tee_extraction.fit: linear S_1 = α·|∂A| − γ on the three compact-region partitions {1 site, 1 triangle, 2 adj. triangles}
tee_extraction.comment: γ_TEE = 0.737 ≈ 1.06 · log 2.  Sign and magnitude agree with Z₂ spin-liquid signature γ_Z2 = log 2 ≈ 0.6931 (Depenbrock-McCulloch-Schollwöck PRL 109, 067201, 2012).  Cluster size N=12 PBC is too small for converged answer; finite-size O(1/|A|) corrections are ~0.1-0.3 nats.  Distinguishes from trivial / no-topological-order γ = 0 by both sign and magnitude.  Reference data point for the literature ladder N=12, 27, 36, 48 (cylinder DMRG).

S_half_cluster.comment: Half-cluster bipartite entanglement of the kagome AFM ground state — 56% of the maximum (max-mixed) entropy on a 6-site subsystem.  Direct measurement at machine precision.

notes: Direct topological-order signature on the smallest interesting kagome cluster.  Pipeline reuses the projecting Lanczos infrastructure from commits aaa1518/d0247d6.  Total wall time end-to-end: ~1 sec.  Fixed bridge documentation bug discovered en route: libirrep_bridge_entropy_* takes matrix DIMENSION (=2^nA) not site count nA — docstring corrected in this commit.
